calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2020 Set For Trial On Feb-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Amornrit C. Siripan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Adam Brumage, Esq. generally appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
George Garcia Jr., Officer Operations Consultant/Custodian of Record for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Amornrit C. Siripan.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed on March 25, 2019.
Defendant Amornrit C. Siripan's Answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 6, 2019.
Initial Notice of Time & Place of Trial served on October 28, 2019, setting trial for March 2, 2020.
Order Granting plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Notice of Settlement was filed on October 7, 2020.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on October 13, 2020, setting trial for February 22, 2021.
On March 15, 2021, Department 206 assigned this matter to Department 514 for Prove-Up Hearing, continued to March 29, 2021 for courtesy copies. On March 29, 2021, matter was continued at the request of the plaintiff to June 28, 2021.
There were no DOE defendants.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Electronic Copy of the Application of Credit Card...............ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Cardholder Agreement............................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Monthlhy Credit Card Statements.................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Amornrit C. Siripan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,046.86.
Costs - $290.00.
Total - $3,336.86.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Continued To Jun-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 514
